tech.title_2: at some of the world's largest companies.
tech.subtitle: Not a trend, not a template. This is the stack that billion-dollar companies choose to run products used by millions of people every day — and it's exactly what I deliver on every project.
tech.disclaimer: The companies listed publicly use these technologies in their products. They are not direct clients — they represent the industry standard of the stack.
